widget.title: Whisper
panel.title: Whisper
panel.placeholder: Type a message, or press Live to start listening...
panel.emptyHint: Click the Live button, press your keybind, or type a message
toast.liveFailed: Could not start live mode. Check mic/ffmpeg.
errors.noSttKey: No Groq API key configured. Go to Settings to add your free key.
errors.noLlmKey: No API key configured for the selected AI provider.
errors.transcriptionFailed: Speech transcription failed. Check your API key and try again.
errors.noSpeechDetected: No speech detected. Please try again.
errors.requestFailed: AI request failed. Check your API key and try again.
errors.ffmpegMissing: ffmpeg not found. Install it to use Live mode.
settings.sttNote: Speech recognition is powered by Groq's Whisper API (free tier available).
settings.llmProviderDesc: Choose which AI model to use for responses
settings.temperatureDesc: Higher = more creative, Lower = more focused
settings.systemPromptDesc: Instructions for the AI assistant. Defaults to an interview/meeting preset — change this for other use cases.
settings.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful voice assistant...
settings.maxHistoryDesc: Maximum number of messages to keep in history
settings.liveModeDefaultDesc: When enabled, pressing the keybind (IPC 'toggle') auto-starts continuous listening. Requires ffmpeg + pulseaudio/PipeWire-pulse.
settings.vadSilenceDbDesc: Audio quieter than this counts as silence. If the assistant never answers, your mic noise floor is too loud — raise this value (closer to 0). If it triggers mid-sentence, lower it (closer to -60). Default -18 dB works for typical laptop mics; external/condenser mics usually want -30 dB.
settings.vadSilenceSecDesc: How long you must pause (seconds) before the assistant answers.
settings.vadMinSpeechSecDesc: Ignore speech bursts shorter than this (filters coughs, clicks).
settings.panelDetachedDesc: Panel floats freely instead of attaching to bar
settings.panelPositionDesc: Where the panel appears on screen
settings.panelWidthDesc: Width of the panel in pixels
settings.ipcNote:
Bind this command to a keyboard shortcut in your compositor:
qs -c noctalia-shell ipc call plugin:whisper toggle
